reasoning: As of mid-April 2025 (Matchweek 31 of 38), Atletico Madrid is sitting in third place, well behind league leaders Barcelona and second-place Real Madrid. At the end of March (Matchweek 29), Atletico trailed Barcelona by 9 points. Barcelona remains undefeated in 2025 and continued their winning streak into April, beating Leganes in Matchweek 31. With only 7 matchdays remaining (a maximum of 21 points available), it is mathematically highly implausible for Atletico to overturn such a large deficit and surpass both Barcelona and Real Madrid. To win, Atletico would likely need to win all their remaining games while Barcelona loses at least three of their final seven and Real Madrid also drops significant points. Given these compounded probabilities, an extremely low estimate is required.
